     The Numbers Business Report

Pet Sematary (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,724,696Details
International Box Office $57,085,036
Worldwide Box Office $111,809,732
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,861,725
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,058,839
Total $6,920,564
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dr. Louis Creed, who, after relocating with his wife Rachel and their two young children from Boston to rural Maine, discovers a mysterious burial ground hidden deep in the woods near the family’s new home. When tragedy strikes, Louis turns to his unusual neighbor, Jud Crandall, setting off a perilous chain reaction that unleashes an unfathomable evil with horrific consequences.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,502,775 (44.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$21,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,585 opening theaters/3,585 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $71,452,772

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 5th, 2019 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: April 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
April 5th, 2019 (Wide), released as Hayvan Mezarlığı (Turkey)
April 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Ukraine)
April 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Argentina)
April 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: June 25th, 2019 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for horror violence, bloody images, and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2570 (Cert #51765), 3/20/2019)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Pet Sematary
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Death of a Son or Daughter, Native American Folklore, Non-Chronological, Scary Kids, Zombies
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, di Bonaventura Pictures, Room 101
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Dr. Louis Creed, who, after relocating with his wife Rachel and their two young children from Boston to rural Maine, discovers a mysterious burial ground hidden deep in the woods near the family’s new home. When tragedy strikes, Louis turns to his unusual neighbor, Jud Crandall, setting off a perilous chain reaction that unleashes an unfathomable evil with horrific consequences.
